rationale: Keep: the cited paper’s core outcomes and constructs (base sales and regular price elasticity; effects of discounting and product line length) closely overlap with the citing paper’s decomposition into intrinsic brand strength and marketing-mix effectiveness (price, promotion, assortment elasticities). Given this strong conceptual linkage in the notes—and only a DOI match without in-text context—it is not safe to treat this as an obvious incidental mention.
